ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_seed" TEXT /* Seed assigned to the team */,
  "team_region" TEXT /* Region the team belongs to */,
  "playin_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the team played in the play-in round */,
  "team_alive" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the team is still alive in the tournament */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "strength_of_scheduling" REAL /* Strength of the team's scheduling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being predicted */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Round number (1-7) the prediction is for */,
  "win_odds" REAL /* Win odds for the team in the given round */,
  "predicted_opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted opponent */,
  "predicted_opponent_seed" TEXT /* Seed of the predicted opponent */,
  "predicted_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the predicted game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_predictions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_predictions_predicted_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "overtime_flg" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the game went into overtime */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being scheduled */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game is scheduled to be played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing in the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 'upcoming', 'win', 'loss') */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game is scheduled to start */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being described */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored by the team per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage of the team */,
  "rebound_margin" REAL /* Average rebound margin of the team */,
  "turnover_margin" REAL /* Average turnover margin of the team */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of the team's schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_teams" (
  "conference_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference-team pair */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the team joined the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
